title: VimFu — Recipe: Mass Rename
description: Use :%s/old/new/g to rename a variable or term across the entire file in one command.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim
Create demo file with repeated variable name

setup.content:
price = 10
tax = price * 0.08
discount = price * 0.1
final = price + tax - discount
print("Price:", price)
print("Final:", final)

steps.say: The variable price appears on almost every line. Let's rename it to cost everywhere at once.
Percent s, price, cost, g for global.
Every occurrence of price is now cost. Five substitutions across the file in one command.
Percent s old name new name g. The fastest way to rename anything across a file.
